archetype: Archetype 5: Luxury (Editorial Light) - Warm Linen & Charcoal

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight leading-none

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Asymmetrical Tetris Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 md:gap-12) for galleries. Avoid perfect symmetry to create tension.

components.buttons: Square/sharp corners, high contrast. Primary: bg-[#1A1A1A] text-white hover:bg-[#333333]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1A1A1A] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#F9F8F6]. Padding: px-8 py-4.
components.cards: Flat, cardless appearance. Images should bleed to edges of their containers. Text sitting below or overlapping, never contained in a generic box.
components.navigation: Sticky, Glassmorphism Crystal Variant (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F8F6]/80, border-b border-[#1A1A1A]/10). Logo left, links right. Generous spacing.
components.kylie_ai_assistant: Floating bottom right. Glassmorphic chat window. Avatar: elegant abstract shape. Sleek, non-intrusive.
components.admin_dashboard: Archetype 4 (Swiss/High Contrast) for admin side. Dense grids (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6). Shadcn UI standard tables, forms. Cardless UI, 1px borders.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images: subtle scale up (scale-105) over 0.6s ease-in-out. Links: 1px underline expansion.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Fade in, slight upward translate (staggered for grid items).
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling (Lenis recommended), subtle parallax on large hero/gallery images.

image_urls.description: Minimalist living room with soft white sofas and large curtains, for the homepage hero section.
Contemporary living room featuring a sleek marble accent wall.
Spacious modern living room with elegant sofas and stylish decor.
Professional male interior designer standing near a counter.
Minimalist abstract composition featuring geometric shapes.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast for all text. Overlays on images must use gradients or min bg-black/30 for readability.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` (e.g., data-testid='booking-submit-button', data-testid='gallery-filter-modern').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS and pure HTML structures (div, section, grid) for the marketing pages to achieve the asymmetrical/editorial layouts.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions (Forms, Modals) but heavily customize them (remove rounded corners, apply custom borders) to match the sharp, editorial brand.
The admin dashboard should use standard Shadcn UI components natively, focusing on data density and clarity.
Install and use '@phosphor-icons/react' for elegant, thin-line icons that match the architectural feel.
Do NOT use generic sans-serif (Inter, Roboto) for headings; explicitly use 'Cormorant Garamond'. Use 'Outfit' for body text.
Implement the Kylie AI assistant using the Gemini 3 Flash API, presented as a floating glassmorphic widget.
Do NOT use placeholder text or placeholder images. Use the EXACT image URLs provided in this file.
Ensure the hero image has an adequate overlay gradient to keep the display text accessible.
Apply generous padding (p-12, p-24) to establish a premium, 'gallery-like' breathing room.
